scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.dev:api: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec db psql -U postgres -d poker_trainer
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @poker-trainer/web lint && bun run --filter @poker-trainer/mobile lint
